meta.title: Budget Reform for Biodefense: Coordination and Leadership
meta.description: Keynote address by Max Brooks, Nonresident Fellow, Modern War Institute at West Point; Senior Resident Fellow, Art of Future Warfare Project, Brent Scowcroft Center on International Security, Atlantic Council; author of World War Z and The Harlem Hellfighters - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
